title: lathyrus luteus f. cirrhosus
intro: Lathyrus luteus f. cirrhosus, also known as the yellow pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family that is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive cirrhose (tubercled) calyx. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and expectorant effects, making it a potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as an antispasmodic, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and muscle spasms. Lathyrus luteus f. cirrhosus can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion for use in herbal medicine, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
